headline: Louisiana-Pacific (LPX) Down 5.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Louisiana-Pacific (LPX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
